item.title: Negotiate Salary with Confidence 💰 • Research market rates for your role. • Highlight your unique skills and achievements. • Practice clear, assertive communication. • Prepare to counteroffer with data-backed reasons. How can you leverage your strengths to negotiate a better salary? #salary #negotiation #ScalePilot #SocialPilot #AIAutomations
item.description: Negotiate Salary with Confidence 💰 • Research market rates for your role. • Highlight your unique skills and achievements. • Practice clear, assertive communication. • Prepare to counteroffer with data-backed reasons. How can you leverage your strengths to negotiate a better salary? #salary #negotiation #ScalePilot #SocialPilot #AIAutomations
